name: Support identity verification policy example
answer:
Customers must complete identity verification before support can change the payout destination.
Support changes the payout destination within 2 hours of identity verification.
Customers receive free fraud monitoring from support.

sources.title: Support Identity Verification Policy
sources.content:
Customers must complete identity verification before support can change the payout destination.
Support changes the payout destination only after 24 hours following identity verification.
